23.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

23.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
23.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
